text: MNC mein meri salary aate hi gaon se call aaya ki be-mausam baarish se fasal barbaad ho gayi hai, toh maine apni saari savings remittance mein bhej di. Meri apni car ki EMI bounce hone wali hai, par main ghar par ye nahi bata sakta kyunki Papa ki 'izzat' gaon ke sahukaar ke samne mitti mein mil jayegi. Main WFH isolation mein bhookha reh lunga, par unhe hamesha yahi kahunga ki shehar mein main bohot aish se hoon.

Startup ki stressful job ke baad jab pata chala ki kisan baap loan installment nahi bhar paye hain, toh maine apna rent ka paisa bhi gaon bhej diya. Main financial pressure ke baare mein baat karke unhe guilt nahi dena chahta kyunki unhone pehle hi meri padhai par saara chit fund ka paisa laga diya tha. Parivaar mein kalesh na ho, isliye main apni takleef chupakar phone par bas muskurata rehta hoon.

Tier-2 city mein shift hone ke baad socha tha ki kuch bachaunga, par gaon mein crop destroy hote hi ghar ki saari zimmedari mere sar aa gayi. Main unhe mana nahi kar sakta kyunki 'log kya kahenge' agar unka software engineer beta unki madad na kare. Mere paas naya laptop lene ke paise nahi bache, par parivaar ki 'shaan' bani rahe, bas wahi mere liye sabse zaroori hai.

WFH isolation mein mera dimaag phat raha hai par main ghar remittance bhejna kam nahi kar sakta kyunki wahan khet sookhne se sab udhaar par chal raha hai. Agar maine apni financial precarity ke baare mein bataya toh Mummy pareshan ho jayengi, isliye main chupchap extra freelance kaam karta hoon. Unka mujh par jo garv hai, main usse tootne nahi de sakta, chahe meri apni savings wipe out kyun na ho jayein.

Gaon mein bank ki kist repay na hone par Papa bohot tension mein thay, isliye maine bina soche apni credit card limit use karke paise bhej diye. Main unse ye nahi keh sakta ki meri MNC ki salary remittance trap mein phasi hai aur mera apna kharcha nahi nikal raha. Unki nazar mein main ek 'safal' beta hoon, aur us image ko bachane ke liye main har mahine debt spiral mein dhasne ko taiyaar hoon.
